title: You Have To Treat A Bicycle Like An Evanglion
display_title: You Have To Treat A Bicycle Like An Evanglion
wikitext:
[]: You Have To Treat A Bicycle Like An Evanglion             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Feb 03, 2010 9:39 pm Bikes designed by Sadamoto.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Feb 03, 2010 11:43 pm Wow.The bikes look pretty nice.But why are they so pricey?It's kinda ridiculous to charge that much for a bike.Even if they were designed by someone.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Feb 04, 2010 8:19 am fucking ugly, and overpriced for a cheap-O bike like that. the eva 01 looks cool though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Feb 04, 2010 8:39 am Those bikes look extremely normal and like something I would see at Wal-Mart.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Feb 04, 2010 11:26 am Man, all it takes to get designer credit is to play with the paint job? What a disappointment.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Feb 04, 2010 2:56 pm They look nothing special if you ask me.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Feb 04, 2010 10:44 pm If they were decent quality racing bikes, the price would be reasonable.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Feb 04, 2010 10:49 pm If they made an Eva style bike, they should have it based on an actual unit instead of just plug suits. Certain features of each Eva designed in the bikes' appearances (01's horn, 00's eye, 02's eyes, 03's nose plate). Having the arm pylons on the handle bars would look cool too. They could have put more effort into making these.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Feb 04, 2010 11:10 pm Sammaeloo wrote: They could have put more effort into making these.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaRaver » Sun Feb 21, 2010 7:23 am The bikes are mildly cool, although they could have put more effort and customization into them as was previously mentioned. The price is absolutely ridiculous though. In Japan you could get a nice used car for about that amount of money. See link below: [url]http://tokyo.craigslist.jp/cto/1582113298.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sun Feb 21, 2010 8:20 pm They're expensive because they have 26,000 layers of armor.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sun Feb 21, 2010 10:52 pm They should have an AT field that lets your bike fly and destroy SUVs.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sun Feb 21, 2010 11:16 pm If you buy one of theses, do they kill your mother and then put her soul into it?

[]:             Quote Post by Octahedron » Mon Feb 22, 2010 7:01 am Evangelion the Bicycle, along with Evangelion the Refrigirator and other similar products proves that Gainax will give the licence to anybody who can pay for it, and that anything can be marketed as an Evangelion product if you paint according to a character's colours. I'm still waiting for Evangelion the Flamethrower, tho. That being said, the idea of riding around town an a bike themed after Asuka amuses me on some level.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Feb 22, 2010 2:42 pm Octahedron wrote: I'm still waiting for Evangelion the Flamethrower, tho.

[]:             Quote Post by Octahedron » Tue Feb 23, 2010 2:34 am Kids love that one.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Feb 23, 2010 2:14 pm You'll melt your eye off kid.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 23, 2010 6:04 pm You're looking for this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=8640 We're supposed to be talking about a bicycle here.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Tue Feb 23, 2010 10:37 pm Octahedron wrote: That being said, the idea of riding around town an a bike themed after Asuka amuses me on some level.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Feb 25, 2010 9:20 pm SADAMOTO MADE THIS?! WELL, THEN, YOU BETTER TAKE GOOD CARE OF THEM LIKE AN EVANGELION. YOU DO ANYTHING BAD TO THEM, AND SEELE WILL RELEASE THE INSTRUMENTALITY PROJECT.
summary:
